all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And the woman said to Elijah, Now by this I know that thou art a man of God, and that the word of the Lord in thy mouth is truth.
1 Kings 17:24
Quote of the Day
"As we walk by faith in the Lord, abiding in Him, and He in us, we come to know He lives."
Elder Gerrit W. Gong | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
